name: Netlify Open Source Plan
description: Netlify offers a dedicated Open Source plan with generous credits, unlimited team members, and free production deploys for qualifying projects.

perks.title: 10,000 Credits/Month
perks.description: 10,000 monthly credits covering deploys, compute, bandwidth, and web requests.

perks.title: Unlimited Team Members
perks.description: Invite your entire contributor team at no cost.

perks.title: Sites Stay Active
perks.description: Sites remain active even if credits run out.

eligibility: Project must use an open-source license.
Must not be a commercial project (company or individual).
Must feature a link to Netlify on main or internal pages.
requirements: Add a link reading "This site is powered by Netlify" with a link to netlify.com, or use a premade Netlify badge.
applicationProcess: Fill out the Netlify open-source application form.
